title: S&P 500 Gains and Losses Today: News Corp Shares Jump on Profit Beat and AI Plans
text: U.S. equities were mixed, with the S&P 500 losing 0.1% on Friday, Aug. 11, 2023, after a higher-than-expected rise in producer prices.

title: News Corp Shares Rise After Profit Beat on Cost Cuts and Says It Anticipates AI Gains
text: News Corp shares climbed after the company posted better-than-expected results on cost-cutting moves, and said artificial intelligence would help boost future results.

title: News Corp profits plunge 75% - but media giant hails 'opportunity' of AI
text: News Corporation has reported a 75% fall in profits - but says it is optimistic about the future thanks to the "remarkable opportunity" of AI.

title: News Corp looking to AI in a bid to slash costs after profits tumble 75%
text: News Corp (NASDAQ:NWS), the owner of the Sun and the Times newspapers, has reported a 75% decline in its annual profit and said it will roll out AI-generated content in a bid to cut costs. The company's net income for the financial year ended June 30 stood dropped to $187m in the 12 months just gone from $760m a year earlier as it was hit by a decline in ad income, which was felt most acutely in the UK and Australia.

title: News Corp beats profit estimates as digital subscriptions rise
text: News Corp beat estimates for fourth-quarter profit on Thursday, benefiting from its cost-cutting measures and a rise in digital subscriptions for its Dow Jones news and data services.

title: News Corp Swings to Loss Amid Revenue Drop, Book-Publishing Struggles
text: CEO says news publisher is in talks with AI companies to establish the value of its content.

title: News Corp fiscal 4Q earnings top expectations even as revenues decline on multiple fronts
text: News Corp (NASDAQ:NWS)oration delivered mixed results after the bell Thursday, doing enough in the process to push its stock in the right direction.  The Fox News, New York Post and The Wall Street Journal owner posted fiscal fourth-quarter revenue of $2.43 billion, down 9% year-over-year from $2.67 billion and below the analyst consensus of $2.49 billion.

title: News Corporation Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results for Fiscal 2023
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--News Corporation (“News Corp” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq: NWS, NWSA; ASX: NWS, NWSLV) today reported financial results for the three months and fiscal year ended June 30, 2023 (includes 13 and 52 weeks, respectively, compared to 14 and 53 weeks in the three months and fiscal year ended June 30, 2022, respectively). Commenting on the results, Chief Executive Robert Thomson said: “News Corp's Fiscal 2023 results highlighted the durability and depth of our revenue streams.

title: Will News Corp Stock Trade Lower Post Q4 Results
text: News Corp stock (NASDAQ: NWSA), a global, diversified media and information services company, is scheduled to report its fourth-quarter results on Thursday, August 10.

title: News Corporation 4Q profit drop anticipated as advertising market remains challenging
text: News Corporation is expected to report a plunge in its profits and lower revenue as compared to the same period last year when it hands down its latest financial results. The media conglomerate - whose assets include Fox News, New York Post, and The Wall Street Journal - is set to report its fourth quarter fiscal 2023 results on Thursday, August 10.

title: Simon & Schuster purchased by private equity firm KKR for $1.62 billion
text: NEW YORK — Simon & Schuster has been sold to the private equity firm KKR KKR, +2.69%, months after a federal judge blocked its purchase by rival publisher Penguin Random House because of concerns that competition would shrink in the book market.
